title: Infosys Extends Strategic Collaboration with University of Nottingham for Student Management System
detailed_summary: Infosys and the University of Nottingham announced an extension of their strategic collaboration to maintain and modernise NottinghamHub, the university’s Student Information System. The collaboration builds on work since 2017 in which Infosys supported digital transformation of the Student Information System, resulting in reduction of incident volumes by 70 percent, improved system availability and performance by approximately 30 percent, reduced infrastructure costs by over 35 percent, and improved user experience. Infosys will use Infosys Cobalt and Infosys Topaz Fabric to strengthen cloud capabilities, improve application availability, implement Multi-Factor Authentication, unify systems, and automate processes across the university’s global campuses.

key_facts.fact: Infosys and the University of Nottingham announced an extension of their strategic collaboration to ensure high performance and security compliance for the University's critical Student Management System.
Infosys has supported a comprehensive digital transformation of the University of Nottingham's Student Information System since 2017.

The prior collaboration resulted in reduction of incident volumes by 70 percent, improved system availability and performance by approximately 30 percent, reduced infrastructure costs by over 35 percent, and improved user experience.
Infosys will help the University of Nottingham maintain NottinghamHub, its Student Information System, and enhance key student lifecycle processes.
The collaboration will modernise the University's infrastructure to improve application availability and strengthen web security through the implementation of Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA).
Infosys will leverage Infosys Cobalt and Infosys Topaz Fabric to support the transformation.

partnerships_or_deals.description: Infosys and the University of Nottingham extended their strategic collaboration for the University's critical Student Management System, including maintaining NottinghamHub, enhancing student lifecycle processes, modernising infrastructure, improving application availability, and strengthening web security through MFA.

products_or_platforms.name: Infosys Cobalt
products_or_platforms.description: Infosys Cobalt will be leveraged to support the University of Nottingham's cloud journey and digital infrastructure modernisation.
products_or_platforms.target_market_or_use_case: cloud journey and digital infrastructure modernisation

products_or_platforms.name: Infosys Topaz Fabric
products_or_platforms.description: Infosys Topaz Fabric will be leveraged as a purpose-built agentic services suite to help modernise operations, unify systems, and automate processes for data-driven decision-making.
products_or_platforms.target_market_or_use_case: modernising operations, unifying systems, and automating processes
